description_long: This armchair features a sturdy wooden frame with gently curved armrests and legs, giving it a classic and robust appearance. The seat, backrest, and inner sides are upholstered in a patterned fabric with a repeating diamond motif in muted tones of beige, pink, and brown. The upholstery covers both the seat cushion and the tall, rectangular backrest, providing a comfortable and inviting sitting area. Decorative nailhead trim outlines the edges of the armrests and sides, adding a touch of vintage elegance. The legs are short and slightly curved, seamlessly integrated into the wooden frame. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional craftsmanship and homey comfort, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A classic wooden-framed armchair with curved armrests, short legs, and patterned fabric upholstery featuring a diamond motif. Decorative nailhead trim and a tall, cushioned backrest enhance its vintage, comfortable look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full patterned seat and backrest, with both curved wooden armrests visible and the nailhead trim outlining the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved wooden armrest, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the continuous upholstery pattern along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tall, rectangular backrest fully covered in the patterned fabric, with the wooden frame visible along the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the curved wooden armrest, nailhead trim, and the seamless upholstery pattern.
attribute_armrest_design: curved wooden armrests with nailhead trim
attribute_leg_type: short, curved wooden legs integrated into the frame
